title: Gradačac, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Gradačac, Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Gradačac is a city in Federation of Bosnia and Herzegovina with a population of 41,000. A city in northeastern Bosnia known for the Gradačac Castle (Husein-kapetan Gradaščević Tower), a unique 19th-century fortress.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
